font-size: 18px;"><i><u>Paired samples</u></i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="262.5" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-7" edge="1" parent="1" source="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-3" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" target="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-3" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;gradientColor=none;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#AAFF73);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(transparent, rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 15px;">Normality ?</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="145" x="330" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#99CCFF);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>Student test for paired samples</b></font><div><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>- n &gt; 30 = Z-test</b></font></div><div><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>- n &lt; 30 = t-test</b></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="210" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#99CCFF);strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 0)); font-size: 16px;"><b>Wilcoxon T test for paired samples</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="150" x="440" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-3" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.551;entryY=0.015;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;strokeColor=light-dark(#000000,#000000);" target="CiW7l67GAdoPCCe5uWal-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
